name: Image Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto by Maropost creates multiple versions of each product image you upload. This includes one main image and two thumbnail images (for product lists, searches, etc)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product images can be any dimensions but must be no larger than 2 MB in size to be uploaded. Neto then automatically converts images into WebP format, resizes images, and compresses images based on the settings you define."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Change Image Settings"}], "data-id": "change-image-settings"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To reduce website load times, it's recommended to keep your images as small as possible. To alter the resize settings and more:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Web Store ", "bold": true}, {"text": "link. The "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " page will scroll to the "}, {"text": "Web Store ", "bold": true}, {"text": "section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Convert to WebP image format"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Image dimensions for full, thumbs, RMA, customers and store finder."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Number of images that display per product."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Thumb image quality."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Number of alternate images for content pages."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Image Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " link."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Q0iRtMAJ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Q0iRtMAJ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ImageSettings.png", "width": 701, "height": 519}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Image Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, you can change:"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "These settings are not applied retroactively to your images. If you need to make changes to existing images, refer to instructions on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1554-add-images-to-products#add-images-by-importing-urls", "children": [{"text": "reprocessing images"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make any changes and click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
